message:
feat(summary): add git diff integration to session summaries

- Add ProjectDir and IncludeGitDiff options to summary.Options
- Add getGitFileChanges() helper to get modified/created/deleted files from git
- Enrich SummarizeSession with git state when IncludeGitDiff is true
- Update generateKillSummary to include git diff by default

This completes the git diff integration for bd-3dxk (End-of-Session
Output Summarization) epic acceptance criteria.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
